Clipboard history manager that auto-captures, browses, and re-pastes clips, with optional source tracking and expiry.

ClipHive is a fast, privacy-first clipboard history manager for Chrome.

Copy text on any web page, and ClipHive automatically captures and stores it. Access your entire clipboard history with one click, search for old clips, and re-paste them instantly.

KEY FEATURES

• Clipboard History — Automatic capture with searchable history (default 500 clips, configurable)
• One-Click Re-Copy — Instantly re-copy any previous clip with a single click
• Smart Paste — Paste directly into focused text fields, textareas, and contenteditable elements on any page
• Rich Text Support — Stores optional HTML fragments; preserves formatting when pasting
• Pin Important Clips — Pin clips to keep them at the top of your list
• Organize with Folders — Create folders to group related clips by topic or project
• Text Templates — Save reusable text snippets for quick insertion
• Search — Fast full-text search across your entire history
• Sensitive Content Detection — Automatically mask clips that may contain tokens, passwords, or API keys
• Auto-Expiry — Optional automatic deletion of sensitive clips after a set time
• Pause/Resume — Temporarily stop capturing clips without losing history
• Keyboard Shortcut — Open ClipHive instantly with Ctrl+Shift+V (Cmd+Shift+V on Mac)
• Export & Import — Backup and restore your history as JSON or CSV
• Cross-Device Sync — Optional opt-in sync of clips across your Chrome profiles (using Chrome's encrypted sync)
• No Ads, No Tracking — Privacy-first design with no telemetry, analytics, or third-party services

WHY CLIPHIVE?

• Privacy by Default — Your clips stay on your device unless you explicitly enable sync
• Simple & Fast — No bloat, no ads, no tracking — just a clean clipboard manager
• Developer-Friendly — Built with plain JavaScript, no frameworks; easy to inspect and modify
• Fully Open Source — Transparent code you can review and trust

HOW TO USE

1. Copy text on any web page (Ctrl+C / Cmd+C)
2. Click the ClipHive icon in your toolbar (or press Ctrl+Shift+V / Cmd+Shift+V)
3. See your clip history instantly
4. Click any clip to re-copy it, or use the paste button to insert into the focused field
5. Use Advanced settings for folders, templates, export/import, and sensitive content handling

PERMISSIONS EXPLAINED

ClipHive requests only the permissions it needs:
• Clipboard — To read and write your clipboard
• Storage — To keep your clips safe on your device
• Tabs — To enable pasting into web pages
• Offscreen — (Optional) To capture clipboard events in browser UI contexts
• Alarms — To clean up expired sensitive clips

Your data is yours. We don't collect it, track it, or send it anywhere without your consent.

KEYBOARD SHORTCUT

Press Ctrl+Shift+V (or Cmd+Shift+V on Mac) to open ClipHive instantly.

QUESTIONS OR ISSUES?

Report bugs or request features on our GitHub: https://github.com/your-org/ClipHive
A simple extension to convert text case. Transform selected text - uppercase, lowercase, title case and more

Transform selected text on any webpage instantly, uppercase, lowercase, title case, sentence case, and toggle case. No copy-pasting to external tools needed.

TextCaseConverter is a lightweight Chrome extension that lets you change the case of any text directly on the page you're working on. 

Select text, click a button, and it's transformed in place. It works in text fields, rich text editors, Google Docs, and even on non-editable page content.

Two Modes of Operation

- Page Selection Mode
Select any text on a webpage, click the TextCaseConverter icon, and pick a transformation. The text is replaced in place — no need to copy, convert elsewhere, and paste back. If the text is non-editable, the transformed result is shown in the popup for easy copying.

- Direct Input Mode
Paste or type text directly into the extension for quick conversions without needing to interact with any webpage. Ideal for one-off transformations when drafting emails, formatting titles, or cleaning up text.

Five Case Transformations

- UPPERCASE: Converts all letters to uppercase. Great for headings, acronyms, or emphasis. Example: "sample text" to "SAMPLE TEXT"

- lowercase: Converts all letters to lowercase. Useful for cleaning up accidental caps lock or formatting code. Example: "SAMPLE TEXT" to "sample text"

- Title Case: Capitalizes the first letter of every word. Perfect for article titles, headings, and proper names. Example: "sample text" to "Sample Text"

- Sentence case: Capitalizes only the first letter of each sentence. The standard format for body text and paragraphs. Example: "SAMPLE TEXT" to "Sample text."

- tOGGLE cASE: Flips the case of every letter. Uppercase becomes lowercase and vice versa. Handy for fixing text typed with caps lock on. Example: "Sample text" to "sAMPLE TEXT"

Works Everywhere
- Text inputs and textareas: transformed in place with proper event handling so form frameworks (React, Vue, etc.) pick up the change
- Rich text editors (contenteditable): replaces selected text in editors like Gmail compose, Notion, WordPress, and more
- Google Docs: copies the transformed text to your clipboard so you can paste it back
- Non-editable page text: displays the result in the popup with a one-click copy button

Additional Features
- Dark & Light Theme: Toggle between dark and light mode with your preference saved across sessions
- One-Click Copy: Copy transformed text to your clipboard instantly
- In-Place Replacement: No round-tripping to an external converter, text is modified right where you selected it
- Auto-Inject: If the content script isn't loaded yet, the extension injects it automatically no page reload needed
- Clean, Minimal Interface: No clutter, no ads, no account required

Who is this Extension for?
- Writers formatting headlines, blog posts, and articles
- Developers cleaning up text in documentation or code comments
- Students formatting titles for papers and citations
- Social media managers formatting post copy
- Anyone who's ever typed a whole paragraph with CAPS LOCK ON

How to Use
- Select text on any webpage (or switch to Direct Input mode)
- Click the TextCaseConverter icon in your toolbar
- Click the case transformation you want
- Done! Text is replaced in place, or shown in the popup if non-editable

TextCaseConverter is fast, lightweight, and requires no sign-up. 
It works entirely in your browser with ZERO external servers. Transform your text in one click, right where you need it.
A floating code formatting and export tool for developers.

🚀 SNAPCODE — Beautiful Code Screenshots, Instantly

Turn your code into stunning, shareable images — right from your browser. No signups, no uploads, no external tools. Just paste, style, and export.

▸ Fast Export

▸ Floating Window

Nano is a multichain crypto wallet built to help you securely manage your digital assets across multiple blockchain ecosystems from your browser.

With Nano, you can create or restore a wallet, manage multiple accounts, view balances, send and receive assets, connect to supported dApps, and review transactions before approving them. Nano is designed to provide a simple and secure experience for users who want access to Web3 across different networks in one place.

Key features:

Multichain wallet experience
Create, import, and manage multiple accounts
Send and receive supported assets
Connect to supported decentralized applications
Review and approve transactions securely
Browser extension experience optimized for daily crypto use
Nano is a non-custodial wallet. Your wallet credentials and recovery phrase remain under your control. Always store your recovery phrase securely and never share it with anyone.
Save, search & organize everything you copy. 100% local, no cloud, no tracking.

CopyCruise | Your Clipboard History, Supercharged

Never lose a copied text again. CopyCruise is a fast, privacy-first clipboard manager that saves, searches, and organizes everything you copy in your browser.

100% PRIVATE | YOUR DATA STAYS LOCAL

All data stored locally on your device using IndexedDB
No servers, no cloud sync, no data collection
No analytics or tracking whatsoever
No account required, just install and use
Password managers automatically blocked

KEY FEATURES

Instant Search
Find any clip instantly with powerful fuzzy search. Filter by content type, source website, tags, date range, and more.

Pin Favorites
Keep important clips pinned at the top for quick access. Never dig through history for frequently used text.

Tags & Organization
Organize clips with custom tags. Search by tag to find related content quickly.

Text Snippets
Create trigger shortcuts that expand into full text. Type ";addr" to instantly insert your full address.

Keyboard First
Full keyboard navigation. Press 1 to 9 to quick select clips. Use Enter to copy, arrow keys to navigate.

PIN Lock
Protect your clipboard history with a PIN. Auto locks when you're away from the computer.

Smart Blocking
Password managers (Bitwarden, 1Password, LastPass, Dashlane) are automatically blocked. Add your own domains too.

Undo Delete
Accidentally deleted a clip? No problem. Restore it from the Recently Deleted section in Settings within 24 hours.

Encrypted Export
Export your clipboard history with password protection using AES 256 encryption. Automatically detects and decrypts when importing.

Configurable Popup Size
Choose between Compact, Default, or Large popup sizes to fit your workflow.

Custom Accent Colors
Personalize the look with 6 accent color options: Stone, Blue, Purple, Green, Orange, and Pink.

Side Panel Mode
Keep CopyCruise open while you work. Access your clipboard history without leaving your current tab.

Floating Window
Pop out CopyCruise as a separate window that stays on top while you work.

Dark Mode
Beautiful light and dark themes that follow your system preference.

Content Type Detection
Automatically detects URLs, code, and email addresses for smart formatting and filtering.


PERFECT FOR

Developers copying code snippets
Writers collecting research quotes
Customer support with canned responses
Anyone who copies and pastes frequently


KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS

Alt+Shift+V: Open CopyCruise
Alt+Shift+S: Open in Side Panel
1 to 9: Quick select clips
Enter: Copy selected clip
Arrow keys: Navigate history
Backspace: Delete clip


WHAT COPYCRUISE CAPTURES

Text copied with Ctrl+C / Cmd+C
Text from "Copy" buttons on websites
Does NOT capture text copied outside browser
Does NOT capture images or files
Does NOT capture from blocked sites


FREE FOREVER

CopyCruise is completely free. No premium features, no subscriptions, no ads.


SUPPORT

Having issues? Visit our website for help and documentation.


Privacy Policy: https://copycruise.com/privacy
Clipboard History Manager is a must-have productivity extension for anyone who frequently uses the copy and paste functions.

Clipboard History Manager is a must-have productivity extension for anyone who frequently uses the copy and paste functions. This simple yet powerful tool automatically keeps track of the last 10 items you copied, making it easy to recall and reuse text snippets. No more losing important copied text when you accidentally copy something new. Whether you're a student, a developer, or just someone who loves efficiency, Clipboard History Manager will streamline your workflow and save you time.

Key Features:
- Automatically saves the last 10 items you copied.
- Easy-to-use interface for managing your clipboard history.
- One-click to copy items back to your clipboard.
- Lightweight and fast, seamlessly integrates with your browser.

Why You Should Install Clipboard History Manager:
- Enhance your productivity by never losing copied text.
- Quickly access and reuse text snippets without re-copying.
- Simplify your daily tasks with a user-friendly design.
- Perfect for anyone who works with text regularly, from students to professionals.

Install Clipboard History Manager today and take control of your clipboard!

ST PP is a productivity tool designed for PFF data entry, streamlining workflows on PFF data pages. Features include clearing all form data, customizing team colors, highlighting duplicate player positions, marking players from previous plays, pasting and managing player photos, searching players by number, locking/unlocking player entries, and voice command support for efficient navigation. Best local clipboard manager to save, search, and pin your copy-paste history automatically.

Never lose a copied link, snippet, or important text again.

CopyVault is a professional-grade clipboard history manager designed to streamline your workflow by automatically capturing everything you copy. While other extensions only save items when you "paste," CopyVault works silently in the background, ensuring your productivity is never interrupted.

🚀 Why Choose CopyVault?
Most users copy dozens of items a day—links, code snippets, email addresses, and notes. Without a dedicated clipboard manager, that data is gone the moment you copy something new. CopyVault transforms your clipboard from a single-item memory into a powerful, searchable clipboard vault.

💎 Key Features for Maximum Productivity
1. Automatic Background Saving
No more manual entries. CopyVault captures every text snippet you copy automatically. Whether it’s a single word or a full page of research, it’s saved in your history instantly.

2. Lightning-Fast Search
Stop scrolling through endless lists. Use our optimized search bar to find that specific URL or snippet from three days ago in milliseconds.

3. Pin & Organize
Do you have an email template or a specific piece of code you use every hour? Pin it. Pinned items stay at the top of your list, making CopyVault a permanent library for your most-used data.

4. Instant Keyboard Access (Alt + V)
Speed is everything. Open your clipboard history instantly using the Alt + V (or Option + V on Mac) shortcut. It’s designed to stay out of your way until you need it.

5. Clean & Minimalist Interface
We believe productivity tools should be beautiful. Enjoy a modern, clutter-free UI with a built-in Dark Mode that matches your professional workspace.

🔒 Privacy & Security First
In an era of data tracking, CopyVault stands apart.

100% Local Storage: Your clipboard history never leaves your computer. We do not use cloud syncing, which means your sensitive data (like addresses or private notes) is never sent to a server.

No Data Collection: We don't track your browsing, we don't sell your data, and we don't have access to your vault.

Complete Control: Delete individual items or clear your entire history with a single click.

Who is CopyVault for?
Developers: Keep track of code snippets, Terminal commands, and API keys without switching tabs.

Writers & Students: Save research quotes, citations, and links as you browse.

Customer Support: Store common replies and templates for instant access.

Power Users: Anyone who wants to stop the "copy-paste-repeat" cycle and start working smarter.

Expand abbreviations into text snippets while typing. Boost your productivity with smart text expansion.

Supercharge Your Typing with Steroids – the Smart Text Expander for Chrome 🚀

Tired of typing the same phrases, emails, or snippets over and over again?
With Steroids, you can create powerful shortcuts that instantly expand into full text, saving you time, boosting your productivity, and keeping your writing consistent everywhere on the web.

✨ What you can do with Steroids:
	•	Type less, say more: Expand short abbreviations (;sig) into long text (your full email signature).
	•	Automate the routine: Insert today’s date, the current time, or even clipboard content with smart variables.
	•	Stay in flow: Place your cursor exactly where you want after expansion – perfect for templates like “Dear |,”.
	•	Work smarter in forms: Works seamlessly in Gmail, CRMs, help desks, and almost any web text field.
	•	Keep organized: Create, edit, and search your snippets in seconds.
	•	Coming soon: Enable/disable snippets per site, toggle on/off instantly, and import/export with ease.

👩‍💻 Perfect for:
	•	Professionals who answer lots of emails.
	•	Support agents handling repetitive replies.
	•	Developers who use code snippets daily.
	•	Students, writers, and researchers who need templates and citations at their fingertips.

⚡ Why Steroids?
Because your words deserve a productivity boost. With an intuitive design and blazing-fast expansion, Steroids makes repetitive typing a thing of the past.

Get more done, waste less time.
Install Steroids today and turbo-charge your typing!
Professional JSON, CSV, YAML, and XML visualizer, validator, and formatter.

Visualize your JSON, YAML, XML and TOON file with just one right click 

JSONMASTER is the ultimate developer companion for working with data. Whether you are debugging APIs, analyzing configuration files, or exploring complex datasets, JSONMASTER turns raw text into a beautiful, interactive graph in seconds.

Key Features:
💎 Powerful Visualization: Instantly convert JSON, YAML, CSV, and XML into highly interactive, zoomable tree graphs.
🛠️ Smart Auto-Repair: Paste broken or malformed JSON? JSONMASTER's intelligent analyzer fixes common syntax errors automatically.
🔍 Deep Exploration: Navigate deeply nested objects with ease using our high-performance rendering engine that handles even massive datasets.
⚡ One-Click Detection: Right-click anywhere on the web to instantly visualize selected data or the entire page.
🎨 Modern Dark Mode: Designed for developers with a premium, high-fidelity interface that supports both light and dark themes.

서포트포스트의 한국/중국 배송정보 간편 입력 프로그램입니다. 현재 네이버 스마트스토어 "주문 상세 정보" 간편 입력, 타오바오/1688의 배송물품과 송장 번호 전송을 지원합니다.

한국 배송정보 간편 입력 사용법:
1. 주문 상세 정보를 전체 복사 (Ctrl+A & Ctrl+C)
2. 서포트포스트 사이트에서 배송 대행->동의 후 배송신청서 작성->배송 신청서로 이동 (https://www.s-post.kr/Front/Acting/Order_W.asp)
3A. Ctrl+Shift+1 입력으로 기본정보를 붙여 넣고 도로명주소 자동 입력 및 알림창 확인 후 Enter 키로 입력 동의. (끝)
3B-1. 확장 프로그램 아이콘 클릭 후 텍스트 창에 붙여넣기 또는 "Paste" 버튼 클릭.
3B-2. "Submit" 버튼 클릭 (끝)

중국 배송정보 간편 입력 사용법:
1. 타오바오/1688 로그인
2. "待收货" 항목 들어가기 (하단의 URL과 동일해야 함)
3A. Ctrl-Shift+2 입력, 약 5초 정도 후에 알림창 "Submitted!" 확인 (끝)
3B-1. 확장 프로그램 아이콘 클릭 후 "Scan" 버튼 클릭
3B-2 약 5초 정도 후에 알림창 "Submitted!" 확인 (끝)

단축키:
Ctrl+Shift+1: 기본정보 입력/도로명주소 창 팝업/입력 (네이버 / 기타 국내 쇼핑몰 추가 예정)
Ctrl+Shift+2: 타오바오/1688 배송물품, 송장 번호 전송

작동 URL:
국내 배송정보 간편 입력: https://www.s-post.kr/Front/Acting/Order_W.asp
타오바오: https://buyertrade.taobao.com/trade/itemlist/list_bought_items.htm?tabCode=waitConfirm
1688: https://trade.1688.com/order/buyer_order_list.htm?tradeStatus=waitbuyerreceive
*모바일 환경에서는 키위 브라우저와 함께 사용할 수 있습니다.
Convert markdown (tables, lists, etc.) to Notion-compatible format with one click

Notionizer - Seamless Markdown to Notion Converter

Tired of manually reformatting markdown content when pasting into Notion? Notionizer automatically converts your markdown text to Notion-compatible format with a single click or keyboard
shortcut.

KEY FEATURES:

✓ Table Conversion
Transform markdown tables into perfectly formatted Notion table blocks without manual reconstruction.

✓ List Support
Seamlessly convert both ordered and numbered lists, including nested structures.

✓ Rich Text Formatting
Preserve all inline formatting including bold, italic, strikethrough, inline code, and links.

✓ Heading Hierarchy
Maintain document structure with H1-H6 heading conversion.

✓ Code Block Support
Convert fenced code blocks with syntax highlighting language preservation.

✓ Keyboard Shortcut
Use Ctrl+Shift+V (Mac: Command+Shift+V) for quick conversion without opening the popup.

HOW IT WORKS:

1. Copy your markdown text from any source
2. Click the Notionizer icon or use the keyboard shortcut
3. Paste directly into Notion - your content is perfectly formatted

BENEFITS:

• Save Time: No more manual reformatting of tables and lists
• Maintain Structure: Preserve your document hierarchy and formatting
• Increase Productivity: Streamline your workflow between markdown editors and Notion
• Simple & Intuitive: One-click operation with minimal learning curve
• Privacy Focused: All conversion happens locally in your browser

PERFECT FOR:

- Developers documenting code in Notion
- Writers migrating content from markdown editors
- Teams collaborating across different platforms
- Anyone who frequently works with both markdown and Notion

Start converting your markdown content effortlessly today!

Key Selling Points for Chrome Web Store:

Why Users Should Install:

1. Time Saver - Eliminates hours of manual reformatting when transferring content to Notion
2. Preserves Complex Structures - Tables and nested lists are notoriously difficult to recreate in Notion manually
3. Workflow Integration - Bridges the gap between markdown-based tools and Notion
4. Zero Learning Curve - Simple one-click or keyboard shortcut operation
5. Privacy & Security - No data leaves your browser; all processing is local
6. Free & Lightweight - No subscription fees, minimal resource usage

Trace visualizer for Salesforce Agentforce agents

AgentLens turns Agentforce agent traces into interactive visualizations — directly from the Agentforce Builder.

Click "Copy Code" in the NGA builder, then click "Open in AgentLens" to instantly see:  

 • Agent Graph — which sub-agents talked to each other, how many times, and in what order      
  • Finite State Machine — internal orchestration flow for each sub-agent: LLM calls, tool executions, variable mutations, and handoffs                                                  
 • Step-by-Step Inspector — walk through every event with full detail: system prompts, model output, tool inputs/outputs, and variable diffs                                               
 • Graph Analysis — degree distribution, connectivity, betweenness centrality
                                                                                                 
Zero dependencies. All processing happens locally in your browser. No data is transmitted  anywhere.                                                                                     
                                                                                                
 Works with traces from: 
                                                                      
   • Agentforce Builder (NGA builder preview)
   • SF CLI agent preview                                                                        
   • Agentforce DX VS Code extension
Boost productivity with rich-text email templates, auto-expanding text shortcuts, and real-time usage & time-saving analytics.

Tired of typing the same emails, links, and replies over and over? Meet TextSwift, the ultimate, lightweight snippet manager designed to save you hours every week.

Unlike basic text expanders, TextSwift features a built-in Rich Text editor and a full-size workspace, allowing you to create beautiful templates with bolding, italics, bullet points, and hyperlinks perfectly formatted for Gmail, Outlook, LinkedIn, Google Docs, and CRM platforms.

⚡ Core Features:

Rich Text WYSIWYG Editor: Save emails exactly how you want them to look. Add links, lists, and formatting effortlessly in the quick popup or the full-size editor dashboard.

Auto-Expanding Shortcuts: Type a trigger like /zoom in any text box, press Space, and watch it instantly expand into your full template without opening the extension. Fully compatible with complex editors like Google Docs!

Right-Click "Quick Save": Instantly turn any text on the web into a reusable template. Just highlight, right-click, and select "Save to TextSwift" without breaking your workflow.

Clipboard History Manager: TextSwift automatically saves your recently copied items to a dedicated tab, so you never lose an important link or note again.

Dynamic Variables & Auto-Dates: Add placeholders like {{Name}} to prompt you to fill in the blanks upon injection. Use {{Date}} or {{Time}} to automatically insert the current day and time into your messages.

Smart Analytics Dashboard: Track your productivity! TextSwift automatically calculates how many times you use your snippets and estimates the total hours and minutes of typing you've saved.

Cloud Sync & Backup: Your snippets securely sync across any computer connected to your Chrome profile. Export and import them as JSON backups to share with your team.

🚀 Power-User Macros:

Cursor Placement ({{CURSOR}}): Dictate exactly where your blinking cursor should land after a snippet is injected so you can keep typing seamlessly.

Form Filling ({{TAB}}): Build snippets that navigate through web forms automatically by simulating Tab key presses.

Clipboard Injection ({{CLIPBOARD}}): Instantly inject whatever text is currently saved to your device's clipboard directly into the middle of your template.

Snippet Chaining: Embed snippets inside of other snippets using their shortcut triggers (e.g., placing {{/intro}} inside another template) to build modular text blocks.

🔒 Privacy & Security First:

TextSwift operates entirely locally in your browser.

We use Chrome's native syncing functionality. No external servers or databases are used.

Strict Content Security Policies and HTML sanitization ensure your browser stays safe from malicious scripts.

No telemetry, no tracking, and no data selling. Your keystrokes are evaluated locally and never recorded.

Automatically saves your copy-paste history. Quickly access, search, and reuse your last 50 copied items with a clean, modern UI.

📋 Smart Clipboard Manager – Never Lose a Copied Text Again!

Tired of losing important text the moment you copy something new? Smart Clipboard Manager automatically saves everything you copy and lets you access, search, and reuse your clipboard history in one clean popup — right inside Chrome.

No cloud. No account. No tracking. 100% private and offline.

─────────────────────────────────
✅ KEY FEATURES
─────────────────────────────────

🔁 Automatic Clipboard History
Every time you copy text on any website, it's instantly saved to your history. No setup needed. Just copy and it's there when you need it.

🔍 Instant Search
Quickly find any previously copied item using the built-in search bar. Results highlight your search term in real time — no scrolling through endless lists.

📌 Last 20 Items Always Ready
Stores your most recent 20 copied items. Older entries are automatically removed so your list stays clean and relevant.

🗂️ Card-Based UI
Each copied item appears as a clean card showing:
- Preview of the copied text (2 lines)
- Time it was copied (e.g. "2 min ago", "3h ago")
- One-click Copy button
- One-click Delete button

⚡ One-Click Recopy
Click Copy on any card to instantly send that text back to your clipboard. Ready to paste anywhere.

🗑️ Delete Items or Clear All
Remove individual items you no longer need, or wipe the entire history with the Clear All button.

🌙 Auto Light & Dark Mode
The UI automatically adapts to your system theme — clean white in light mode, elegant dark in dark mode. No manual toggling needed.

⏱️ Timestamps on Every Item
See exactly when you copied each item — "just now", "5m ago", "2h ago", or the date if older.

─────────────────────────────────
🔒 PRIVACY FIRST
─────────────────────────────────

Your clipboard data NEVER leaves your device.

- All data is stored locally using chrome.storage.local
- No servers, no accounts, no sync, no analytics
- No ads, no tracking, no data collection
- Open, transparent, and lightweight

─────────────────────────────────
🧑‍💻 WHO IS THIS FOR?
─────────────────────────────────

✔ Developers — reuse code snippets and terminal commands
✔ Writers & bloggers — quickly access quotes and drafts
✔ Students — manage research notes and citations
✔ Marketers — reuse ad copy, hashtags, and email templates
✔ Customer support teams — paste repeated responses instantly
✔ Anyone who copies and pastes regularly throughout the day

─────────────────────────────────
⚙️ HOW IT WORKS
─────────────────────────────────

1. Install the extension
2. Copy any text on any website (Ctrl+C / Cmd+C)
3. Click the Clipboard Manager icon in your toolbar
4. See your saved history — search, copy, or delete anytime

That's it. No configuration required.

─────────────────────────────────
📦 LIGHTWEIGHT & FAST
─────────────────────────────────

Built with vanilla JavaScript and zero external dependencies. Under 20KB total size. Loads instantly without slowing down your browser.

─────────────────────────────────
🙋 PERMISSIONS EXPLAINED
─────────────────────────────────

- storage — to save your clipboard history locally on your device
- clipboardRead — to detect and save what you just copied
- clipboardWrite — to copy an item back to your clipboard when you click Copy

No other permissions are requested. Ever.

─────────────────────────────────

Install Smart Clipboard Manager today and stop losing what you copy!

Automatically captures copied content (Text, Images, Video URLs) into a buffer and exports to Word.

Snippet - Effortless Training Material Collector

Snippet streamlines the process of gathering training materials, research notes, and documentation directly from your browser. 

Key Features:
- **Instant Capture:** Automatically saves copied text (Ctrl+C) to a persistent buffer, or use the manual "Add to Snippet" context menu.
- **Smart Formatting:** Preserves rich text, headings, and formatting while automatically embedding images.
- **Video Detection:** Intelligently identifies video URLs and embedded video frames (YouTube, Vimeo, etc.) for easy reference.
- **One-Click Export:** Compile your collected snippets into a standard Microsoft Word (.doc) document, complete with source URLs for every entry.
- **Deduplication:** Smart logic prevents duplicate captures to keep your notes clean.
- **Privacy First:** All data is stored locally in your browser and cleared only when you choose.

Perfect for educators, technical writers, and researchers who need to aggregate content from multiple web sources quickly and efficiently.
